steps.t: The guard at the gate of Mossward greets you with a friendly smile, beckoning for you to approach. <rgb=#00FF00>(Move forward by pressing W, and…
Bevan at the gate recommended that you introduce yourself to Geralt, one of the residents of Mossward. <rgb=#00FF00>(Move forward by pressing W,…
Skardí Bendblade is inside the Mossward blacksmith shop to the south-east of the fountain. <rgb=#00FF00>(Enter the Blacksmith Shop by right-clic…
Skardí Bendblade is inside the Mossward blacksmith shop south of the gate.
Skardí Bendblade has asked you to set your gear down on the counter, and he will fix it up for free... this time. <rgb=#00FF00>(Right-clicking o…
Skardí Bendblade has repaired your gear and invited you to pick it up from the counter. He eagerly waits for your feedback on the work he has done. &l…
The man standing inside the Mossward blacksmith shop, Meneldir, has called you to speak to him. <rgb=#00FF00>(When you acquire new weapons and a…
Meneldir has hurried outside the blacksmith shop, and you should follow him. The ringing of the bells signals that some trouble has come to Mossward.
Mossward is under attack, and Meneldir needs your help to save the town.
Eleri has called for everyone in Mossward to help protect the town from the ravages of the goblin raiding party.
Tegwyn's mother Wenna is grateful for your help saving her son from the Uruks.
Meneldir stands by the gate of Mossward, considering the events of the last few minutes.
